settings.title: Overview
settings.content: Every SheyeOladejo order is prepared with care and precision. Our delivery process is designed to ensure your piece arrives securely, on time, and in perfect condition.

settings.title: Order Processing
settings.content:
All orders undergo a preparation phase before dispatch:
Orders are processed within 1–2 working days
During high-volume periods, processing may take 3–4 working days
Processing time is separate from delivery timelines
For pre-order or made-to-order pieces, processing begins from the production date specified on the product page.

settings.title: Delivery Timeframes
settings.content: Delivery timelines vary based on product type and location:

settings.title: Ready-to-Wear
settings.content:
Lagos: 1–3 working days after dispatch
Nationwide: 3–7 working days
International: 5–10 working days

settings.title: Couture & Custom
settings.content: Delivery timelines are dependent on production schedules and will be communicated during consultation or upon order confirmation.

settings.title: Shipping Costs
settings.content:
Shipping rates are calculated at checkout based on delivery location and order size
International shipping costs vary depending on destination

settings.title: Dispatch & Tracking
settings.content:
Once your order has been dispatched:
You will receive a dispatch notification with delivery details
Tracking information will be provided where applicable
If you do not receive a dispatch update within the expected timeframe, please contact us with your order number

settings.title: Delays
settings.content:
While we aim for timely delivery, delays may occasionally occur due to:
Courier service disruptions
Customs processing for international orders
High demand periods
If your order has not arrived within the estimated timeframe, we recommend allowing an additional 2–3 working days before contacting us

settings.title: International Deliveries & Duties
settings.content:
For all international orders:
Customs duties, taxes, and import fees are the responsibility of the client
These charges vary by country and are not controlled by the Brand

settings.title: Delivery Responsibility
settings.content:
Once an order has been dispatched:
Delivery is handled by the assigned courier service
The Brand is not liable for delays caused by third-party logistics partners
In cases where a package cannot be traced, a replacement may be arranged.

settings.title: Failed Deliveries
settings.content:
If delivery is unsuccessful due to:
Incorrect address
Unavailability of recipient
The client may be responsible for redelivery costs.

settings.title: Lagos Pickup Option
settings.content: Clients may opt for in-store pickup from our Lagos location for urgent orders

settings.title: Multiple Shipments
settings.content: In some cases, items may be shipped separately based on availability. You will be notified if your order is dispatched in multiple deliveries.

settings.title: Final Note
settings.content:
Each order is prepared with intention. We encourage clients to confirm delivery details carefully before completing their purchase.
For delivery support or urgent requests, our team is available via WhatsApp.
